capabilities.name: Knowledge governance health check
capabilities.guidance: Run kdoc_health after documentation changes to verify governance rules.

capabilities.name: Frontmatter validation
capabilities.guidance: Run kdoc_validate on new or modified Knowledge files to check frontmatter compliance.

capabilities.name: Documentation coverage metrics
capabilities.guidance: Run kdoc_coverage to identify undocumented modules.

capabilities.name: Documentation suggestions
capabilities.guidance: Run kdoc_suggest to get recommendations for missing documentation.

capabilities.name: Knowledge schema definitions
capabilities.guidance: Run kdoc_schema to retrieve current schema definitions for Knowledge files.

capabilities.name: Documentation vs code reconciliation
capabilities.guidance: Run kdoc_reconcile to compare documentation against code reality and detect drift.

capabilities.name: Documentation impact analysis
capabilities.guidance: Run kdoc_impact before changing documented modules to find affected Knowledge docs.

capabilities.name: Architecture Decision Record creation
capabilities.guidance: Use adr-create for architecture decisions. Check existing ADRs before proposing alternatives.

capabilities.name: TLDR document creation
capabilities.guidance: Use tldr-create to document module scope, requirements, and gap tags.

capabilities.name: Governance check skill
capabilities.guidance: Use governance-check to scan for structural and reference issues in Knowledge files.
